title: FIRST BOOK SIGNING!
excerpt: Many of you have asked me if I plan on doing a book tour for Craft a Life You Love , and although I haven't planned one yet, it does sound like a fun thing to do! If you're in…
body:
Many of you have asked me if I plan on doing a book tour for Craft a Life You Love, and although I haven't planned one yet, it does sound like a fun thing to do! If you're in the Phoenix area this weekend, the awesome store, Pinspiration, is hosting a Meet and Greet Book Signing this Sunday! It will be tons of fun, but the space is limited, so please register here.

PS - I updated my events calendar, so check it out -------------------> click here
